Temporary PR created to run build and SonarQube checks against the latest SPESTG-480 runtime validation branch.

This branch includes the final DEV validation updates for the DIA exception notification flow, including:
- Dataverse logical name fixes for TPC Log and TPC Configuration Key
- Encrypted file pre-validation refinement to avoid rejecting valid binary PGP files
- Decryption / invalid encrypted content scenario coverage
- Temporary DEV-only staging failure validation support
- Unit test updates after the runtime validation fixes

Validation status:
- Unit tests passing: 21/21
- SonarQube Quality Gate passing
- New issues: 0
- Coverage on new code: 83.3%
- Duplications: 0.0%
- Security hotspots: 0
- No merge conflicts against DEDIAAutomationDevelop

This PR is currently for validation/scanning only and is not intended for immediate merge until the final demo/review is completed and Vishal confirms the preferred merge approach.

SPESTG-480 Final DIA exception notification validation updates
This PR contains the final validated updates for SPESTG-480 and is ready for review/merge.
